title: Complex Arithmetic As Real-Pair Algebra

solver_reuse.target: complex real-pair bad product-coordinate and bad norm-squared QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed exact complex real-pair rows where replay computes (1 + 2i) * (3 - i) = 5 + 5i but a row claims product real part 4, and |3 + 4i|^2 = 25 but a row claims 26.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional complex algebraic rows only when they add distinct exact real-pair arithmetic, polynomial-root, or algebraic-identity pressure; keep holomorphy, contour integration, residues, analytic continuation, and algebraic-closure theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode real-pair complex arithmetic as deterministic NRA obligations.
Replay algebraic complex witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Emit checked bad real-pair algebra evidence; the bad product-coordinate and norm-squared rows now have checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the product and norm.
Add polynomial identity and eigenvalue examples before broadening the complex-analysis slice.
Keep the fundamental theorem of algebra, holomorphy, contour integration, residues, and analytic continuation marked Lean-horizon.
